overview: A Cleveland-based urology practice offering comprehensive care for male reproductive health and sexual dysfunction. The practice specializes in male infertility, erectile dysfunction, and testosterone therapy, delivered by a fellowship-trained urologist.
highlights: Fellowship-trained in male reproductive medicine and microsurgery
Expertise in penile implants and vasectomy reversals
Chief of Male Reproductive and Sexual Health at University Hospitals
targetAudience: Men seeking specialized urology care for male reproductive health and sexual dysfunction issues in the Cleveland area.
